problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
hypothesis: Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response may resolve What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
